title: McCollum plays MSG villain as Hawks tie series
content: CJ McCollum became the latest to join the list of Madison Square Garden villains as his fourth-quarter exploits helped the Hawks tie their first-round series against the Knicks with a come-from-behind 107-106 win in Game 2.

title: Gobert carries DPOY snub into Jokic matchup, win
content: On the same day he finished fourth in Defensive Player of the Year voting, Timberwolves center Rudy Gobert held three-time MVP Nikola Jokic to 1-of-8 shooting in their Game 2 matchup, helping Minnesota to a series-tying 119-114 win.

title: Martinook lifts Canes in 2OT after goal overturn
content: Jordan Martinook, who was stopped on a penalty shot in the first overtime session after a potential winning goal was overturned, beat Linus Ullmark at 13:53 of the second overtime to help the Carolina Hurricanes past the Ottawa Senators 3-2 Monday night.

title: Wemby captures DPOY as first unanimous winner
content: Victor Wembanyama, 22, is both the youngest DPOY winner in NBA history and the first to win the award unanimously.

title: Dodgers' Diaz to have elbow surgery, miss months
content: Los Angeles Dodgers closer Edwin Diaz is scheduled to undergo surgery Wednesday to remove loose bodies in his right elbow, the team announced Monday, and the expectation is that he could miss around three months, a source told ESPN's Alden Gonzalez.

title: PGA Tour boots both Hawaii events from '27 sked
content: The PGA Tour will not be in Hawaii in 2027 for the first time in 56 years as it moves toward a revamped schedule that no longer will start the season in the middle of the Pacific Ocean.

title: Counsell: MLB rule in place for Ohtani 'bizarre'
content: Chicago Cubs manager Craig Counsell thinks that a Major League Baseball rule that allows the Los Angeles Dodgers to carry 14 pitchers because of Shohei Ohtani is "bizarre," adding that the defending National League MVP is getting "special consideration."

title: 🏈 Jordan Reid's seven-round NFL mock draft
content: Jordan Reid projected every single pick for this week's NFL draft, from the Raiders' selection at No. 1 to Mr. Irrelevant.

title: Schefter’s NFL draft week intel: Nuggets on top picks, and trade candidates
content: How early could Jeremiyah Love be drafted? Will Ty Simpson go in Round 1? Adam Schefter has the latest.

title: LeBron does it again, and one team has a big problem: Windhorst on the first weekend of the playoffs
content: A 25-year-old LeBron strategy for the Lakers, a new defense in Cleveland and a message from Oklahoma City: Here's what we learned as the postseason tipped off.

title: Even in retirement, Chris Paul's legacy is rooted in this season's playoffs
content: Dozens of NBA players have been mentored by the future Hall of Famer, and many of them are vying for the title.

title: WrestleMania 42 Night 2 takeaways: Will Reigns make this title run alone?
content: Roman Reigns is champion once again, but what should fans expect in the latest title reign of the OTC?

title: The Warriors begin an offseason with massive uncertainty
content: Golden State enters another offseason in search of a co-star for Stephen Curry, and the Warriors might be searching for a new coach too.

title: The player most likely to be traded for all 30 MLB teams -- and 6 if-all-goes-wrong candidates
content: From major league stars to prospects to if-all-goes-wrong candidates, here's who could be on the trade block come August.

title: Ranking the top 50 players in the 2026 Stanley Cup playoffs
content: As 16 teams face off for the ultimate prize in pro sports, these players will have the biggest impact.

title: Men's college basketball buzz: State of blue blood rebuilds
content: North Carolina awaits a decision from Henri Veesaar while Kansas and Kentucky vie for the No. 1 recruit.

title: Women's transfer rankings: No. 1 Audi Crooks commits to Oklahoma State
content: Audi Crooks is headed to Oklahoma St., Jordan Lee is bound for South Carolina and Kymora Johnson is staying at U.Va.

title: The beer shower can wait, but this Bayern side deserves to be celebrated
content: Bayern Munich successfully defended their Bundesliga crown thanks to a merciless attack and impressive solidarity.

title: Is the Premier League now Man City's to lose? Bayern clinch Bundesliga, more
content: Man City's win over Arsenal has thrown the title race back in City's favor, plus Man United beat Chelsea.

title: Steph Curry, Paige Bueckers lead athletes that took in Coachella 2026
content: One of the biggest music festivals each year came and went with big name athletes taking in the desert.

title: 'Nobody was going to beat the 10th pick': How the Bengals wooed the Giants into trading vet Dexter Lawrence
content: Lawrence informed the Giants he wanted a new deal or trade, the Giants didn't want to let him go -- until the price was right.

title: MLS Power Rankings: Following a great week, Nashville continues to rise up
content: Nashville SC continue their great week as they move on up in this week's edition of ESPN's MLS Power Rankings.

title: The biggest question facing every WNBA team in training camp
content: How will Angel Reese fit the Dream? Will the Wings return to the playoffs? Can Caitlin Clark remain healthy?

title: Inside the fallout of the Dianna Russini and Mike Vrabel photos
content: How Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel scrambled to respond to photos published in the New York Post.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Man United eye Real Madrid star as Casemiro replacement
content: Manchester United have added Real Madrid midfielder Aurélien Tchouaméni to their shortlist. Join us for the latest transfer news and rumors from around the globe.

title: 10 NFL draft prospects to put on your fantasy radar -- and three others to monitor
content: With the NFL draft nearly upon us, it's time to think about how the top prospects will fare in fantasy.

title: Top scorers, sleepers and streamers: Fantasy hoops outlooks for every WNBA team
content: Scouting reports and fantasy-relevant player picks from each team in the WNBA, including the two new expansions.

title: Draft guide: Rankings, strategies and more
content: Everything you need to know before your fantasy women's basketball draft, including rankings, tips and news.

title: Watch: BJP leader Nazia enters Lenskart store, applies tilak on staff amid dress code row
content: A political leader has entered a dispute over Lenskart's employee dress code. The leader defended Hindu religious symbols after allegations of restrictions. Lenskart has since apologized and pledged to revise its guidelines. The company stated it welcomes all symbols of faith and culture. This incident has broadened the debate on workplace expression and religious identity.

title: 'This will be my wedding gift': UP groom swaps mandap for morcha over power bill
content: A groom in Banda, facing a pre-wedding power cut, led his baraat to the district magistrate's office demanding a bill waiver.  Kuldeep cited a doubled bill after a smart meter installation, making payment difficult. Officials assured a resolution, prompting the groom to proceed with his wedding, with an inquiry ordered into the disconnection.

title: ‘Horrible day for Gujarat Titans’: Hayden blasts ‘unacceptable’ collapse in MI hammering
content: Gujarat Titans' batting coach Matthew Hayden slammed his team's 99-run defeat to Mumbai Indians, calling the batting 'unacceptable' and a 'horrible day'. He highlighted a powerplay collapse that exposed the middle order prematurely and criticised the bowling for conceding too many runs late. Hayden stressed the need for better mindset and execution from his star-studded lineup.

title: ‘Kejriwal is a bully’: Bansuri Swaraj after Delhi high court judge refuses to recuse
content: Delhi High Court dismissed Arvind Kejriwal's plea to recuse Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma from the excise policy case, deeming it based on conjecture. BJP MP Bansuri Swaraj accused Kejriwal of pressuring the judiciary. Justice Sharma clarified her participation in professional events and family government counsel roles did not indicate bias, stating the plea put the judiciary on trial.

title: How Wall Street ‘reacted’ to Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook is stepping down after nearly 15 years, with John Ternus set to take over as CEO on September 1, 2026. Cook will transition to executive chairman, capping a tenure that saw Apple's market capitalization soar and revenue quadruple. Ternus, a 25-year Apple veteran leading hardware engineering, is expected to guide the company through AI advancements.

title: TMC MP Yusuf Pathan’s kin beat Mumbai man, his family as car splashes water
content: Yusuf Pathan's father-in-law and two others were arrested for allegedly assaulting a man and his family in Byculla. The incident began when a car splashed water on a relative, leading to an argument and subsequent physical assault with bamboo sticks and a baseball bat. The defence claims both parties were involved in the altercation.

title: NCP (SP) president Sharad Pawar admitted to Mumbai hospital
content: Veteran politician Sharad Pawar, president of the Nationalist Congress Party (SP), has been admitted to Mumbai's Breach Candy Hospital for a routine health check-up. The 85-year-old leader is undergoing tests and follow-up procedures, with sources confirming there is no serious concern. This comes after Pawar recently took his Rajya Sabha oath from a wheelchair.

title: Prince Yadav: From escaping dad’s beatings to beating batters with pace in IPL 2026
content: Prince Yadav, an LSG pacer, honed his skills playing tennis-ball cricket in his village. He still plays the game, crediting it for his arm speed and yorkers. Despite a past age-fudging ban, he is now a rising uncapped Indian fast bowler. He learns from seasoned players like Mohammed Shami and Zaheer Khan.

title: Amazon files lawsuit after losing millions in fake laptop and GPU refunds
content: A sophisticated refund scam has cost Amazon $4 million in stolen goods like graphics cards and laptops. A group named RBK allegedly exploited customer support by claiming packages never arrived, even using fake police reports. Amazon uncovered the scheme through an undercover investigator, leading to a lawsuit against named individuals and unknown accomplices.

title: Announced, relaunched, delayed, burned: Pachpadra refinery’s troubled timeline
content: Rajasthan's ambitious greenfield refinery project, plagued by political interference and cost escalations, faces further delay after a fire incident in its main Crude Distillation Unit. The Rs 79,459 crore project, with 92% work completed, was set for inauguration, but the blaze has cast doubt on its commissioning timeline.

title: Japan training drill turns fatal: 3 soldiers killed in tank misfire
content: Three Japanese soldiers were killed and one injured when their tank's ammunition misfired during a training exercise in Oita. Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi described the incident as "truly regrettable" and offered condolences as the cause is under investigation.

title: 'Bhooth Bangla' crosses Rs 100 crore mark worldwide in 4 days
content: Akshay Kumar's new horror-comedy 'Bhooth Bangla' has crossed the Rs 100 crore mark globally. The film, released on April 18, 2026, is performing well at the box office. Despite a dip on Monday, its worldwide collection stands strong. The movie features a large ensemble cast and is competing with other releases.

title: 'Never been more ...':Tim Cook in memo to employees on his exit as Apple CEO
content: Apple CEO Tim Cook announced his transition to executive chairman later this year, after a 15-year tenure. He expressed confidence in Apple's future and its core values, praising the team's dedication. John Ternus, SVP of hardware engineering, will succeed Cook as CEO, with Cook pledging to support the smooth transition.

title: Pakistan pauses $1.5 billion Sudan arms deal after Saudi objection: Report
content: Pakistan has halted a $1.5 billion weapons and fighter jet deal with Sudan following Saudi Arabia's request to terminate the arrangement and withdraw financing. This development occurs amidst Sudan's ongoing conflict and intensifies regional rivalries, with Saudi Arabia previously brokering the deal.

title: US limits intelligence sharing with Korea after remarks on North Korea nuclear site: Report
content: US has partially restricted satellite intelligence sharing with South Korea after Seoul's unification minister revealed details about a suspected North Korean uranium enrichment site. While the minister claims the information was public, Washington views it as an unauthorized disclosure.  Despite this, officials state military preparedness and broader intelligence cooperation remain unaffected.

title: US starts refund process for Trump tariffs: Can Indian exporters claim?
content: Exporters and end consumers are not permitted to file claims directly, although some companies, such as FedEx, may opt to pass on the refunded amounts at their discretion.

title: Allahabad high court judge recuses himself from Rahul Gandhi's dual citizenship case
content: Justice Subhash Vidyarthi recused himself from hearing Rahul Gandhi's dual citizenship case after being peeved by petitioner's social media posts. The judge admitted he should have issued notice to Gandhi before dictating an FIR order, and chastised lawyers for not providing correct legal positions on hearing the accused.

title: West Bengal polls: 9 arrested after BJP-TMC clash outside Kolkata police station
content: Political clashes erupted outside Kolkata's Ekbalpur Police Station, leading to the arrest of nine individuals, including BJP and TMC members. The violence, fueled by counter-sloganeering during election campaigning, prompted police intervention and the registration of three FIRs. This incident heightens tensions as West Bengal gears up for crucial Assembly elections.

title: Tilak Varma outguns Gujarat Titans as record-breaking blitz rewrites IPL history
content: Tilak Varma delivered a historic IPL century, smashing 101 off 45 balls to lead Mumbai Indians to a dominant 99-run victory.  His explosive innings, featuring a remarkable turnaround in scoring rate, saw him outscore the entire Gujarat Titans lineup. Varma's maiden century also marked a personal milestone, earning him his first Player-of-the-Match award.

title: Pumpkin seed oil for hair: How to make pumpkin seed oil for super hair growth in summer
content: Summer's toll on hair can be mitigated with a simple, natural solution: pumpkin seed oil. Packed with zinc and healthy fats, this oil nourishes the scalp, reduces hair fall, and supports healthier growth over time.

title: Watch: Yogi attributes Subhas Chandra Bose's ‘give me blood' to Swami Vivekananda
content: Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath's misattribution of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose's famous "give me blood, I will give you freedom" slogan to Swami Vivekananda has sparked widespread criticism. Trinamool and Samajwadi Party leaders condemned the remark, highlighting the BJP's alleged ignorance of Bengal's history and the freedom struggle. The slogan was originally delivered by Netaji to INA soldiers in Burma.

title: Security guard stitches wounds amid staff crunch at Bihar’s Bagaha hospital
content: A security guard assisted doctors with stitching road accident victims' injuries at Bagaha sub-divisional hospital due to a severe shortage of medical staff. The hospital faces a deficit of operating theatre staff, dressers, nurses, and doctors, leading to this unusual measure amid a sudden influx of patients.

title: 'Virat Kohli is the reason I follow cricket': Djokovic’s big reveal at Laureus Awards
content: Tennis superstar Novak Djokovic, hosting the 2026 Laureus Awards, expressed deep admiration for Indian fans and revealed Virat Kohli inspired his interest in cricket. Djokovic hopes to visit India soon for an event, potentially with Kohli, to celebrate sports and spread positive vibes.

title: India may rest top stars for Afghanistan Test, final call with management | Exclusive
content: Team India's management is considering resting key players like Shubman Gill and Jasprit Bumrah for the one-off Afghanistan Test (June 6–10) due to a packed schedule following IPL 2026. With no WTC points at stake and little turnaround time, workload management is the priority. Fringe players like Gurnoor Brar, Manav Suthar, Devdutt Padikkal, Harsh Dubey could earn maiden call-ups instead.

title: JKBOSE class 10th result declared for summer zone Jammu division; check direct link
content: JKBOSE 10th Result 2026: The Jammu and Kashmir Board of School Education (JKBOSE) declared the Class 10th Result 2026 for the Summer Zone Jammu Division at 11 AM on April 21, 2026. Students can access scorecards via jkresults.nic.in and jkbose.jk.gov.in using roll and registration numbers. An SMS service is also available for result access. The marksheet includes subject-wise marks and qualifying status. Re-evaluation and scrutiny options will be announced later through official notification for eligible candidates.

title: Connor McDavid’s wife Lauren Kyle marks milestone before playoff run
content: Connor McDavid capped the regular season with four assists, clinching his sixth Art Ross Trophy as the Oilers secured home-ice advantage. His growing chemistry with linemates and a strong team performance signal readiness for the playoffs. Off the ice, Lauren Kyle’s proud reaction added a personal layer. With momentum and structure in place, Edmonton enters its first-round series against Anaheim with real expectations.

title: Gold price prediction today: Where are rates headed amid Gulf conflict? Check outlook
content: Gold price prediction today: Gold prices are likely to take cues from the US Federal Reserve stance on rate cuts in the near future, says Praveen Singh, Head Currencies and Commodities, Mirae Asset ShareKhan.

title: IMD warns of heat wave in several states; rain, thunderstorms likely across several regions
content: India Meteorological Department forecasts continuing heat waves across north, central, and eastern India until April 25. Meanwhile, rain and thunderstorms are expected in the Northeast, East, South, and parts of West India. Several regions are also warned of hot and humid weather conditions.

title: Drones, robots & precision fire: How Ukraine is defying Russian juggernaut
content: Ukraine is showcasing remarkable resilience against Russia through its innovative defense industry. The nation is producing millions of drones, long-range missiles, and robotic systems. These advanced weapons allow Ukraine to strike deep behind enemy lines and preserve its soldiers. This technological prowess is enabling Ukraine to effectively counter a larger adversary, demonstrating a new model of national resistance.

title: What was the Iranian ship seized by US carrying? Report claims 'dual-use' cargo
content: US naval forces intercepted an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel, the Touska, in the Gulf of Oman, suspecting it carries "dual-use" items. The ship, linked to sanctioned IRISL, was boarded after failing to respond to warnings and operating in violation of a U.S. blockade. Iran condemned the action as "armed piracy."

title: 'If you attempt to run ... ' : US helicopter gunner warns ship near Iran port — watch
content: US forces released video of a helicopter gunner warning a cargo vessel to turn back from a restricted zone near Iranian ports, enforcing a maritime blockade. This action comes amid escalating tensions and disrupted shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, with both nations imposing restrictions.

title: UN outlook: India’s economy to grow 6.4% amid global headwinds
content: India's economy is set for robust growth, projected at 6.4% in 2026 and 6.6% in 2027, according to a UN report. Despite export challenges, strong domestic consumption and services sector performance are key drivers. The nation is also a leader in green job creation, with policies supporting domestic manufacturing in clean energy sectors.

title: ‘Positive and productive’: India-US trade deal 'almost done' in Washington
content: India and the US are nearing a bilateral trade agreement, with negotiators reporting significant progress and only a few issues remaining. Discussions are described as positive and productive, focusing on market access and tariff alignment. This potential deal, aimed at boosting trade between the two nations, is expected to be a win-win, marking a key milestone in economic ties.

title: Who is John Ternus, Tim Cook’s successor, and Apple’s new CEO
content: Apple has announced John Ternus will succeed Tim Cook as CEO on September 1, 2026, with Cook moving to executive chairman. Ternus, a key figure in hardware engineering, faces challenges in AI and mixed reality despite strong iPhone sales. This leadership transition follows extensive succession planning.

title: 'See his love for Anushka': Shefali Bagga shuts dating buzz with Chahal; wants a guy like Virat
content: Sports presenter Shefali Bagga, who is also known for her participation in Bigg Boss 13, has reacted strongly to ongoing speculation linking her to cricketers, making it clear that she’s “fed up” with the assumptions drawn from brief public appearances. In a recent chat, Shefali addressed rumours with Yuzvendra Chahal sparked by a viral pap video, while also opening up about her views on relationships and the kind of partner she wants.

title: Canadian tourist killed, 13 injured in Mexico pyramid shooting
content: A Canadian woman was killed and 13 others injured in a shooting at Mexico's Teotihuacán pyramids. The gunman opened fire on tourists on the Pyramid of the Moon before dying by suicide. Authorities recovered a firearm and ammunition from the scene.

title: Numbers back what you already felt: Delhi hotter by 2.8 degrees in 11 years
content: Delhi's land surface temperatures are steadily rising, with a 2.8-degree Celsius increase observed between 2015 and 2026. Satellite analysis reveals significant heat variations across wards, highlighting areas needing localized cooling strategies. Even March now sees all wards exceeding moderate heat stress thresholds, a concerning first.

title: MSC Elsa 3 shipwreck off Kerala: Union Ministry tells NGT that Tamil Nadu seeks ₹1,041.8-crore compensation for pollution impact
content: NGT Principal Bench asks Ministry to submit details of States and Union Territories that may have suffered environmental damage owing to the shipwreck after it took suo motu cognisance of a report in The Hindu

title: MGNREGA implementation has weakened under TDP-led NDA government, says Jagan
content: The YSRCP chief, citing the scheme’s data, says the approved labour budget, person-days and household completions have fallen over the past two years

title: Cuddalore-Puducherry administrations hold inter-State coordination meeting ahead of Tamil Nadu polls
content: The joint meeting was chaired by Cuddalore Collector Sibi Adhithya Senthil Kumar and Puducherry Collector A. Kulothungan.

title: Only ‘double engine’ government can bring ‘bullet speed growth’ to Tamil Nadu: Chandrababu Naidu
content: Comparing Chennai with other cities like Bengaluru and Hyderabad, Mr. Naidu said the growth of Chennai had stagnated. According to him, the present facilities at Chennai airport are no match for those available at the Bengaluru and Hyderabad airports.

title: Madhu Kishwar booked over misleading content on social media
content: Ms. Kishwar, in a social media post, said a team of Chandigarh police had visited her late Monday night to serve her notice regarding the FIR registered against her

title: DMK, Congress have betrayed women and the country: Chandrababu Naidu
content: Mr. Naidu said he had been fighting for higher reservation for women for the last three decades. Mr. Modi, he claimed, wanted to implement it in the 2029 elections, and so, he announced a 50% increase in seats for all States. Women are aspiring and are waiting for this for so long.

title: Andhra Pradesh to spend ₹30 crore on canal, tank revival in Srikakulam under Jaladhara
content: The work will cover silt removal, bund strengthening and tank-to-tank flow, and is expected to irrigate about 30,000 acres

title: Election Commission will leave no stone unturned for free, fair and transparent election in West Bengal: CEC
content: The election will be ‘fear free, violence free, intimidation free, inducement free, chappa free, ⁠booth-jamming free, source-jamming free’, Gyanesh Kumar says

title: Congress slams PM Modi on women's quota, recalls Rahul's 2018 letter
content: The Opposition party had also demanded that the Centre immediately implement the women's quota on the existing Lok Sabha strength by bringing a Bill in Parliament's Monsoon Session or May-end.

title: Students will have to be given only marks for SSLC third language for this year: Karnataka High Court
content: Any proposal for awarding grades for third language could be considered only from the next academic year as per law, states HC

title: Vinay Kulkarni murder case: Special court castigates three police officers for false testimony against Karnataka Congress MLA
content: Three police officers openly admitted to tendering “false evidence” under oath before the magistrate in the murder case

title: Delhi HC directs expeditious decision on visa plea by Moin Qureshi's daughter
content: The Delhi High Court passed the order on a 2019 petition by Ms. Pernia Qureshi, a U.S. citizen, against the Centre’s decision to revoke her Person of Indian Origin status

title: Watch: Mohan Bhagwat: Anyone knowing Sanskrit can pick up any local language faster
content: Describing Sanskrit as a vital link among the India’s diverse linguistic traditions and a gateway to the country’s civilisational heritage, Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) chief Mohan Bhagwat on Monday (April 20, 2026) called for expanding the use of the ancient language across the country.

title: Kharge asks if Modi wants to be CM of West Bengal
content: Describing the defeat of the Constitution Amendment Bill in Parliament as ‘PM Modi’s defeat’, Congress president accuses the Prime Minister PM of ‘neglecting his official work’ and travelling across Bengal for too long

title: Gujarat cops bust inter-state child trafficking racket, kingpin held in Telangana
content: The police said the gang would obtain newborn babies within 24 to 48 hours of birth and sell them at high prices. They found that the gang had sold two children each from Gujarat and Maharashtra, three from Telangana, and one from Delhi

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: On final day of campaign, Vijay says he won’t yield to ‘anti-people fascist forces’
content: In a statement addressing the people of Tamil Nadu, Mr. Vijay alleged that from the very day he entered politics, the DMK and the BJP had been exerting enormous pressure on him.

title: Living with the Mughals: a legacy that endures despite erasure
content: April 21, 2026 marks five centuries since the decisive Battle of Panipat which led to the founding of the Mughal empire in the Indian subcontinent. Memory, monument and everyday language carry forward a contested inheritance that refuses to fade

title: A Malayalam blockbuster film reignites debate over efficacy of Ayurvedic drugs
content: A section of Ayurveda doctors have objected to the portrayal of a character in Vaazha 2: Biopic of a Billion Bros

title: Row over BJP MLA’s remarks after son’s SUV rams into five people
content: Legislator Pritam Lodhi's son Dinesh is accused of ramming his SUV, a Mahindra Thar, into three young men riding a motorcycle and two women walking on road under the Karera police station area of Shivpuri district on Thursday, leaving them injured.

title: Air Arabia flight from Abu Dhabi lands safely in Thiruvananthapuram after suspected bird strike
content: Despite the suspected bird hit, the crew continued the flight in accordance with standard safety procedures. The aircraft completed its journey without incident and landed safely in Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala

title: BJP used women as a shield to push through delimitation: Congress general secretary K.C. Venugopal
content: The govt. wanted to divide the INDIA alliance and deploy their usual tactics to push through the Constitution Amendment Bill but they had not anticipated the unity in the alliance which is why they appear rattled, the Congress leader says; the next Kerala CM will be chosen in a democratic fashion, says Mr. Venugopal, who played the role of a troubleshooter during the Assembly election campaign

title: Vice-President, Prime Minister greet civil servants on Civil Services Day
content: The Vice President said as the enduring pillar of India's administrative framework, the efforts of the civil servants in strengthening governance and delivering public services are of immense significance

title: India, U.N. officials discuss peacekeeping cooperation
content: The meeting was held between Sibi George, Secretary (West) in the Ministry of External Affairs (MEA), and Khaled Khiari, Assistant Secretary-General for the West Asia, Asia and the Pacific in the Departments of Political and Peacebuilding Affairs and Peace Operations

title: Kejriwal asks people of Tamil Nadu not to vote for NDA, says BJP has captured AIADMK
content: If you vote for the NDA, the BJP and the AIADMK will stop the good work carried out by the DMK government because their intention is to loot the people, says the former Chief Minister of Delhi

title: Kerala’s Thekkady faces bleak tourist season as Periyar Lake’s water level plummets
content: Forest department and Kerala Tourism Development Corporation reduce the seating capacity in their boating services, rendering tickets scarce for tourists, who mainly come to Thekkady to enjoy boating and watch wildlife. Drinking water projects in the Kumily and Chakkupallom panchayats too affected by the falling water level

title: Mohan Bhagwat bats for wider promotion of Sanskrit
content: The RSS chief says a significant proportion of vocabulary across linguistic traditions in India was either derived from or influenced by Sanskrit. Its growth will not displace but rather strengthen other languages, he says

title: Kerala Police warn of fake update scam targeting smarphone users
content: Kerala Police have warned of a cyber fraud targeting users of Vivo and iQOO smartphones through fake "OriginOS Update" messages that trick users into installing malware and stealing sensitive data, including banking credentials

title: IISc’s Centre for Brain Research launches ₹2 crore AI challenge for early detection of cognitive decline
content: Submissions are open from April 20 to May 20 and will undergo a rigorous review by expert jury members

title: Protesters clash with police during torch rally in Manipur
content: A seven-km-long torch rally was brought out from Mayai Lambi to Keishamthong in Imphal West district on April 20, night, but the participants turned violent and clashed with the security forces, says police officer

title: Delimitation, women’s reservation Bills were clubbed together to create confusion, says N. Ram
content: He asserts that women’s reservation and delimitation have no correlation whatsoever, and lauds Chief Minister M.K. Stalin for comprehending the designs of the Centre and projecting the pitfalls of the Bill in appropriate fora

title: Now, a section of Muslims leadership defends Congress action against two MLCs in Karnataka
content: ‘The anti-party activities have caused confusion and resulted in division of votes, helping smaller parties and independent candidates’

title: 5.2-magnitude quake jolts Manipur
content: Tremors were felt in neighbouring Ukhrul district and state capital Imphal, and even Meghalaya but no casualty or damage has been reported so far

title: Both are actors who took the political route, but MGR-Vijay is a facile comparison
content: While MGR spent a long time in politics before he launched AIADMK, Vijay had no boots on the ground, until he formed the TVK, the political party

title: Basava Jayanti celebrated with fervour in several districts of Karnataka
content: Singing of Vachanas, colourful processions carrying Vachanas, motorcycle rallies, religious and cultural programmes mark the celebrations

title: Hi-tech harvester hub scheme: Combine harvesters to be distributed in Mandya
content: Farmers can avail loans at an attractive interest rate of 6% to procure the harvesters, in addition to government subsidies

title: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah questions BJP for failure to operationalise women’s reservation Bill passed in 2023
content: Accusing Narendra Modi and the BJP of being against social justice, Siddaramaiah said the saffron party could have brought in reservation for women during the last 12 years of its rule at the Centre had the party been genuinely in favour of quota for women

title: Digital arrest is a crime against human dignity: CJI
content: Such frauds result in not only financial loss but also a ‘blistering sense of violation’ in victims, Chief Justice of India Surya Kant says at a lecture; he says while the crimes are executed with speed and coordination, institutional response in India has been ‘fragmented and sequential’.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump Has Found His Iran 'Scapegoat'. The Scapegoat Doesn't Know It Yet
content: When all else fails, Trump will throw his Vice President, JD Vance, under the bus. Remember what happened to Mike Pence?

title: Putin Seeks Corrective Steps As Russia's GDP Shrinks 1.8% Amid Ukraine War
content: Putin revealed that Russia’s GDP contracted by a combined 1.8 percent in January and February, with manufacturing, industrial production and construction showing negative growth.

title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Iran Slams US Over 'Illegal' Attack on Iranian Commercial Vessel In Sea Of Oman
content: US-Iran War, Ceasefire, Peace Talks Updates: The war is in its eighth week and has sent oil prices surging because of the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: With Tariffs Stalled, Trump's China Policy Drifts
content: When President Donald Trump returned to office in 2025, he vowed to use tariffs to reset relations with China, which he said was "killing" the

title: Key Iran Warplane, A-10 Warthog, Will Live On To 2030: US Air Force
content: The decision is the latest chapter in a long-running battle over the fate of the plane, which first flew in 1976 and has been on the Pentagon's chopping block for more than two decades.

title: UP Man Strangles Teen Daughter, Pours Acid On Face Over Her Relationship
content: The girl's relationship allegedly brought shame to the family, which drove her father, Vijay Kumar Chaubey, to kill her.

title: Xi Jinping Urges Hormuz Reopening In Rare Call With Saudi De Facto Ruler
